text:
I'll search for this paper to verify the exact title and author information.
Based on my search results, I found detailed information about this paper. 
The paper "MOPO: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization" has authors Tianhe Yu, Garrett Thomas, Lantao Yu, Stefano Ermon, James Zou, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, and Tengyu Ma
. 

The cited reference lists "Aviral Kumar" as the second author (after Tianhe Yu), but this is incorrect. The actual second author is Garrett Thomas, not Aviral Kumar. The automated checker's validation summary correctly identified this mismatch—Aviral Kumar does not appear in the actual author list.

Additionally, I can confirm from multiple sources that 
this paper was published in Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
 in 2020, and 
the official BibTeX entry lists it as an arXiv preprint with arXiv ID 2005.13239
.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published at NeurIPS 2020, but the cited author list is incorrect. Aviral Kumar is not an author of this paper; the actual second author is Garrett Thomas.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.13239
FOUND_TITLE: MOPO: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tianhe Yu, Garrett Thomas, Lantao Yu, Stefano Ermon, James Zou, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, Tengyu Ma
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: LIKELY
